LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER RISHI KAPILA NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF PROHIBITION, STAY, AND OTHER APPROPRIATE RELIEF. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITION FOR WRIT OF PROHIBITION IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS NOT MADE ANY SHOWING THAT RESPONDENTS' REPORTS ARE IN EXCESS OF THEIR JURISDICTION. A REPORT WAS SENT TO THE AMERICAN BOARD OF INTERNAL MEDICINE IN JULY 2009 AND THE COURT CANNOT PROVIDE RETROSPECTIVE INJUNCTIVE RELIEF. THE REPORT TO THE ACCREDITATION COUNCIL FOR GRADUATE MEDICAL EDUCATION FOCUSES ON PROGRAMS, NOT ON INDIVIDUAL TRAINEES. THE NAMES AND STATUS OF TRAINEES ARE MAINTAINED CONFIDENTIALLY. RESPONDENTS RELEASE NO OTHER INFORMATION TO ANY OTHER ENTITIES WITHOUT DOCTORS' CONSENT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-28-2009 Continued To Feb-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Prohibition, Stay, And Other Appropriate Relief;
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RISHI KAPILA Notice of Hearing on Petition for Writ of Prohibition, Stay, and Other Appropriate Relief. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition for writ of prohibition is denied. Petitioner has not made any showing that respondents' reports are in excess of their jurisdiction. A report was sent to the American Board of Internal Medicine in July 2009 and the court cannot provide retrospective injunctive relief. The report to the Accreditation Council for Graduate Medical Education focuses on programs, not on individual trainees. The names and status of trainees are maintained confidentially. Respondents release no other information to any other entities without doctors' consent. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
